title: limonium spreitzenhoferi
intro: Limonium spreitzenhoferi, also known as the Alpine Sea Lavender, is a flowering plant species in the family Plumbaginaceae. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The Alpine Sea Lavender is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as an antiseptic to heal wounds. Herbal preparations of Limonium spreitzenhoferi include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to create teas, salves, and aromatherapy products.
